![][image1]

# SCHEDULE

| 8:00 – 9:30 AM | Registration & Breakfast |
| :---- | :---- |
| 9:30 – 10:00 AM | Kickoff & Ground Rules |
| 10:00 – 11:00 AM | Team Formation & Hacking Begins |
| 11:00 – 11:30 AM | Workshop: AI x Drug Discovery \- Tamarind Bio |
| 12:30 PM | Lunch |
| **6:15 PM** | **Hard Submission Deadline** |
| 6:30 – 7:30 PM | Dinner & Demos |
| 6:30 – 7:30 PM | Judging |
| 8:00 PM | Winners Announced & Closing |

# CREDITS & BIORENDER ACCESS

Redeem one time credits from our hackathon partners.   
[OpenAI](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSehI9dqNFhj7hcU7kt_MyMqBfMsDGdLHR-2XD9NLaEudg7DOw/viewform)   
[Anthropic](https://claude.com/offers?offer_code=4b33d36e-5cff-494e-8c88-e4812ef250a6)  
[Modal](http://modal.com/credits) | use code: MUQ-236-BRX  
[Tamarind Bio](https://forms.gle/4yA6tApXtpGsUz76A) | Access to Bio ML models for AI drug discovery track  
[BioRender](https://app.biorender.com/portal/bio-ai-hackathon) | Access BioRender for scientific communication and building your presentation 

Following this link will activate ChatGPT pro to use codex during the hackathon.  
[http://chatgpt.com/p/YCBIO](http://chatgpt.com/p/YCBIO)

*NOTE: These links cannot be shared with anyone outside of today’s hackathon.* 

# DEMO GUIDELINES

* Live demos in front of judges (rooms will be assigned)  
* 3 minute demo  
* Focus on what you built (live technical demos over pretty slides)  
* Top 8 finalists will demo live in front of everyone

Submission form to demo (submit by 6:15pm\!)  
[https://forms.gle/d3YP1pvdhrms7WPt9](https://forms.gle/d3YP1pvdhrms7WPt9) 

![][image2]

# TRACKS

| AI Scientist 👩‍🔬  | Agents that reason over bio data, search literature, and run experiments end-to-end |
| :---- | :---- |
| **AI Drug Discovery 💊** | Use bio-ML for target ID, molecule design, or property prediction |
| **Bio-data Infrastructure 🏗️** | Scalable pipelines for messy, massive bio datasets |
| **Scientific Data Visualization 📊** | Turn raw bio data into insights a scientist couldn't see otherwise |

# CONTACT INFO 

Need support? You’ve got a team here to support you\!  
Leverage the hackathon group chat and below technical team onsite. 

- Luke Presberg I OpenAI   
- John Robison I Anthropic   
- Joy Liu I Modal

- Michael Steward & Harpreet Khaira I BioRender  
- Tamarind Bio I Shreya and Edward
